caption: In the hushed glow of a neon-lit bar on a winter night, cyberpunk heroine Lyra Sparks slips into the frame, her luminous dress swirling like a hologram, while a band of street vendors and a wandering street musician provide the soundtrack of the city. She strides confidently through the rain-soaked neon, her sharp gaze flickering across the crowd, and the city breathes a warm sigh around her. ⚡💫 #cyberpunk #futurism #streetfashion #digitalart #neonaesthetics
